visual_description: A man in a blue polo shirt sits on an orange couch, smiling broadly and gesturing with his right hand toward someone off-screen to his left. Another person, partially visible in a red shirt, is seated beside him, their face turned away. The background shows a dimly lit café or lounge with other patrons and tables, including a green column and a vase with yellow flowers.
